name: yhelper
text:
git.slygods.com/yhelper

yhelper-docker yhelper-frontend-nl iu-support-chat-nodejs service-users vue-widget-v3 yhelper-rest

Local DNS Setup

Domain: *.deconstruct.dev → 127.0.0.1

# systemd-resolved: создан файл
/etc/systemd/resolved.conf.d/deconstruct.dev.conf

# Ошибка при setup:
# Failed to enable unit: Unit file dnsmasq.service does not exist.
# make: *** [Makefile:36: dns-setup] Error 1
# → dnsmasq не установлен, нужно: apt install dnsmasq
